# Biodiversity

**Summary**: The variety of life in the world or in a particular habitat.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-arslan|Arslan, 2015]] assessed biodiversity of foraminifera across different sites in the Arabian Gulf.

## Scientific Context

- [[2015-arslan|Arslan, 2015]] Indicator of environmental health and stability.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2015-arslan|Arslan, 2015]] Species counting and genetic analysis.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Several species were identified at the genetic level, including Ammonia and Elphidium. ([[2015-arslan|Arslan, 2015, p. 50]])
